title: Feedback - send a Suggestion feedback without names/email
scenario: Feedback submission fails when sending a suggestion without providing name or email in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Tap the menu icon (hamburger or gear) to navigate to App Settings.
5. Enter feedback text in the text field (leave Name and Email fields blank).
expected: Feedback is sent successfully despite not providing a name or email.
